SELECT event_time, epoch_us(event_time) FROM timestamps WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMP '2022-01-01 00:00:00';
SELECT AVG(epoch_us(event_time)) FROM (SELECT event_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_time > TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00') AS filtered_times;
CREATE TABLE additional_events (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO additional_events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2022-01-02 10:00:00'), (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT a.event_id, epoch_us(a.event_time) - epoch_us(b.event_time) AS time_difference FROM additional_events a JOIN timestamps b ON a.event_time > b.event_time;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timestamps WHERE epoch_us(event_time) BETWEEN epoch_us(TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00') AND epoch_us(TIMESTAMP '2022-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT epoch_us((SELECT MIN(event_time) FROM timestamps)) AS min_epoch_us, epoch_us((SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM timestamps)) AS max_epoch_us;
